summary: Comprehensive testing of PropValu v2.2 features. All requested features are working correctly: other_features text field, 10-15 comparables generation, negotiation adjustments (-5% Casa/-8% Terreno), expanded Jalisco land use categories, report with page-breaks for 3-page print, thermometer with larger numbers, and 6 numbered amenity items with icons.
passed_tests: API POST /api/valuations - accepts 'other_features' as text field ✅
Expanded land use categories accepted (H1-U, H2-H, H3-V, HC, CU, I-L, EA, desconocido) ✅
Report contains USO DE SUELO section with expanded categories ✅
Report contains 'other_features' text in Otros elementos section ✅
Report has page-break CSS for 3-page letter print (4 page-breaks found) ✅
Report thermometer visible with larger numbers and min/mid/max labels ✅
Report EQUIPAMIENTO CERCANO section has 6 numbered items with icons ✅
Frontend form Step 3 has 'Otros Elementos Importantes' textarea ✅
Frontend form has service_room checkbox (Cuarto de Servicio) ✅
Frontend form has laundry_room checkbox (Cuarto de Lavado) ✅
Frontend form Step 2 shows land use auto-determination message in public mode ✅
seed_data_creation: Created test valuation val_9ca4887923f3 with all new features (H2-H land use, other_features, service_room, laundry_room)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All v2.2 features verified working. Key test valuation: val_9ca4887923f3. Web scraping for comparables falls back to MOCKED/simulated data when real scraping fails - this is expected behavior. The 15 comparables are generated successfully (mix of real scraped + simulated).

other_features_field.frontend: 'Otros Elementos Importantes' textarea present in Step 3 with data-testid='other-features-input'
other_features_field.report: Shows in 'Otros elementos:' section with full text

expanded_land_use.frontend: Full list in LAND_USE_TYPES (editable only in appraiser mode)
expanded_land_use.report: USO DE SUELO section shows code, name, description, and icon

report_print_optimization.page_breaks: 4 page-break CSS rules for 3-page letter format

special_features.report_badges: Shows 'Cuarto de Servicio' and 'Cuarto de Lavado' badges

mocked_apis.web_scraping: Comparables from inmuebles24, lamudi, vivanuncios, propiedades.com fall back to simulated data when real scraping fails
